_comment: Externalized provider chat-UI selectors. A break is a data edit here, not a code change. Each of input/send/stop is a PRIORITY-ORDERED list: the first candidate that matches wins; if NONE match the call fails loud (no silent degradation). Prefer stable anchors (ARIA role/label, data-testid) over class fragments. `streaming` is an any-present presence check (empty = lean on stop button + text stability). Run `orac browser doctor` after a provider redesign to find which field rotted. Live-verification status is per provider below.

claude._verified: 2026-06-15 — full round trip via `orac browser doctor` (probe OK). Stop selectors unconfirmed (harmless no-op; streaming signal gates completion).

gemini._verified: 2026-06-15 — full round trip via `orac browser doctor` (probe OK; Quill editor + Input.insertText + stop/stability completion).

openai._verified: 2026-06-15 — full round trip via `orac browser doctor` (probe OK; ProseMirror #prompt-textarea + result-streaming completion).
